channel.title: RePass Cloud — Enterprise Software & Cloud Automation
channel.description: RePass Cloud Pty Ltd builds enterprise software, cloud automation, and operational tooling — engineered in Sydney, Australia.

item.title: Why Most Microsoft 365 Identity Automation Fails in Real Environments
item.description: Why Microsoft 365 identity automation often breaks down after the demo phase, and what organisations actually need to make access changes reliable, auditable, schedule-aware, and safe in production.

item.title: Export Microsoft 365 Mailboxes, Aliases, and Sizes with PowerShell
item.description: A practical guide to connecting to Exchange Online via PowerShell and exporting a complete mailbox report including primary addresses, aliases, mailbox types, sizes, and item counts to CSV.

item.title: We Are Standardizing on AOT for All Console Software
item.description: Why Repass Cloud has standardized on Native AOT for all internal CLI and distributed console tooling, covering runtime mechanics, memory behavior, musl considerations, and real-world migration trade-offs.

item.title: Using find with -prune to Exclude Directories (Linux / macOS Guide)
item.description: Technical guide explaining how to use the find command with -prune to efficiently exclude directories such as node_modules, .git, dist, and build folders.

item.title: LunaVPN: Now on ProductHunt - Support Our Vision for a Private and Free Internet!
item.description: LunaVPN launches on ProductHunt, introducing private dedicated VPN servers, WireGuard performance, and affordable privacy-focused internet access.

item.title: LunaVPN: General Availability Launch - Embrace Privacy, Embrace Freedom!
item.description: LunaVPN launches General Availability, offering secure, high-speed WireGuard VPN connectivity with private servers, global access, and enterprise-grade privacy protection.

item.title: Introducing LunaVPN: Your Privacy-Powered Guardian
item.description: Technical overview of LunaVPN architecture using .NET, WireGuard, Docker, Auth0, Stripe, and Alpine Linux to build a secure, scalable, privacy-focused VPN service.

item.title: Embracing the Future: Repass Cloud's Latest Website Redesign
item.description: RePass Cloud migrates its website to Hugo, improving performance, deployment speed, and maintainability while modernizing its SaaS platform and digital presence.

item.title: How to Install Winget on Windows Server 2022
item.description: Step-by-step guide to installing Winget on Windows Server 2022, including required dependencies, PowerShell commands, and prerequisites for automated software deployment.

item.title: Demystifying Language and Regional Settings
item.description: Guide to configuring Windows language and regional settings in AutoUnattend.xml, covering InputLocale, SystemLocale, UILanguage, and UserLocale for multilingual environments.

item.title: Introducing our new design
item.description: RePass Cloud announces its new website redesign, introducing improved usability, modern technology, and a platform for delivering SaaS updates and industry insights.
